html:
GenericBurnt

“Standing near this device will provide the survivor with new things they can craft.

Crafting something new for the first time gives a boost of 15 Sanity.

Once an item is crafted, the survivor will know how to craft that item even away from the machine.”

-

The Science Machine is the tier 1 Science station. It costs 1 Gold Nugget, 4 Logs, and 4 Rocks to craft, and it is available from the start of the game. Like other Prototyper, standing near the Science Machine allows prototyping new recipes. Prototyping items for the first time will grant the player 15 Sanity. Once prototyped, items can be crafted without being near a Science Machine.

Skins

Main article: Belongings

  • The Loyal Terrible Ooze Machine skin was awarded for watching 6 hours of Don't Starve Together on Twitch from October 22, 2020 to November 26, 2020.
  • The Loyal Celebratory Science Machine was given out to everyone in honor of the decade of Don't Starve from April 27, 2023.
Woven - Elegant
Experimental Collection
Experimentation Apparatus
What will you do in the name of progress?
Woven - Elegant
Gothic Collection
Gothic Scientific Instrument
A little pipe organ music in the background really helps the science flow.
Loyal
Hallowed Nights Collection
Terrible Ooze Machine
It's positively oozing with scientific potential!
Loyal
Decennial Collection
Celebratory Science Machine
Celebrate a decade of survival... with some science!

Tips

  • When Wickerbottom is near a Science Machine, it acts as an Alchemy Engine, as she is already able to craft tier 1 science items, thus making the Science Machine serve as a tier 2 Science station.
  • Science machines may be hammered after an alchemy engine has been built to save resources.
  • Wickerbottom should skip the Science machine when playing in DST to let others also use tier 2 science recipes.

Trivia

  • In the early Beta version of Don't Starve, the game used a "Research Points" system, instead of prototyping. When Wilson examines the Science Machine, he states that "It breaks down items into their scientific components", which is a leftover dialogue script from when the game used Research Points.
  • Its old crafting description was "Probe the depths of the universe!".
  • The main section of this machine bears a resemblance to the weighted storage cubes in Valve's Portal series.
  • The Science Machine appears at the top of the screen when the game "Autosaves".
  • There appears to be rope turning the wheels on the machine, while no rope is needed to build it.

Assets

Science Machine

  • Build
  • Burnt

  • Science Machine as seen on the 2018 Valentine Cards.
  • Dont Starve research machines gif by Kelly [1]
  • In "Bachelor of Science" achivment
  • Original HD icon from Bonus Materials from CD Don't Starve.

Don't Starve

"Unlock new crafting recipes."

Unlocks additional Crafting recipes.

Source

"researchlab"
GenericBurnt
“It breaks down objects into their scientific components.”
–Wilson
“Even I don't know everything... yet.”
–Willow
“I am not sure how I feel about... science.”
–Wolfgang
“I will learn unspeakable things.”
–Wendy
“MOTHER?”
–WX-78
“It's a research station. I can learn new things with it.”
–Wickerbottom
“I don't trust all this science stuff.”
–Woodie
“I can't believe I forgot how to build those things.”
–Maxwell
“I prefer battle tö science.”
–Wigfrid
“It's like a science lab in here!”
–Webber
“A center for learning.”
–Warly
“Makes more things!”
–Wormwood
“Rickety, but I can use it to build things.”
–Winona
“Mortals play such silly games.”
–Wortox
“Funny-hair man say "Science" come out of it?”
–Wurt
“I never knew science was such an important part of survival.”
–Walter
“I really want to know what makes it tick...”
–Wanda
“It won't be doing much science now.”
–Wilson
“There's no learning from that now.”
–Willow
“Science not so strong after all.”
–Wolfgang
“It is unspeakably burnt.”
–Wendy
“MOTHER, NO!”
–WX-78
“I can't learn anything from a carbonized research station.”
–Wickerbottom
“How did it get burned?!”
–Woodie
“The fire learned how to burn it down.”
–Maxwell
“Ashes tö ashes.”
–Wigfrid
“I think it's broken.”
–Webber
“That didn't cook very well.”
–Warly
“Fire hurts everything”
–Wormwood
“Can I make the next one?”
–Winona
“Well, that was fun.”
–Wortox
“Aw well.”
–Wurt
“Did that look like a campfire?!”
–Walter
“I was too late to save it.”
–Wanda

summaryViHtml:
Tóm tắt

Máy Khoa học là trạm Khoa học cấp 1. Nó có giá 1 Vàng Thỏi, 4 Gỗ và 4 Đá để chế tạo và nó có sẵn ngay từ khi bắt đầu trò chơi. Giống như các Máy tạo nguyên mẫu khác, việc đứng gần Máy Khoa học cho phép tạo nguyên mẫu các công thức nấu ăn mới. Việc tạo nguyên mẫu vật phẩm lần đầu tiên sẽ cấp cho người chơi 15 Tinh Thần. Sau khi được tạo nguyên mẫu, các vật phẩm có thể được chế tạo mà không cần ở gần Máy Khoa học.
title: Science Machine/DST
